Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.611

Title: Authorizes the town justice of the town of Dix to be a nonresident of such town
Summary: Authorizes the town justice of the town of Dix, county of Schuyler, to be a nonresident of such town.
LawCode: Amd §23, Town L; amd §3, Pub Off L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the town law and the public officers law, in relation to authorizing the town justice of the town of Dix, county of Schuyler, to be a nonresident of such town
